d d!d"e
d#d$e
d%d&e	f
d'd(e
d)d*e
d+d,e
d-d.e
d/d0e
d1d2e
d3d4e
d5d6e
d7d8e
d:d;
The format for kernel event and userspace command is a generic netlink
message.
We can create a message family with function 'create_genl_message_type'.
eg. FSM message family.
When add a new event or command, following the below two steps:
Step 1: create a attribute list that know how to pack or unpack attribute
        value by pre-define the attribute name and data type.
Step 2: add a message in the message family that know what type of attribute
        lists they have.
netlink
FsmAckAttrList
statusZ
event
UnlinkFileEventAttrList
	file_nameZ
uuid_strZ	inode_num
HBTimeoutEventAttrListZ
dev_nameZ
current_elapsed_ms
result
O2netShutdownEventAttrListZ	node_nameZ
node_numZ
node_ip
O2netTimeoutEventAttrListZ
timeout_ms
O2netRecoverEventAttrList
FenceUmountEventAttrListZ
uuid
FenceResetEventAttrList
reason
O2hbNodeLeaveEventAttrList
RecycleReleaseEventAttrListZ
wanted
RecycleCheckEventAttrList
EnableIODebugEventAttrList
FsmMessageZ
FSM_GENL
unlink_file
heartbeat_timeout
o2net_shutdown
o2net_timeout
o2net_recover
fence_umount
fence_reset
o2hb_node_leave
recycle_release
recycle_check
enable_io_debugZ
event_keeperT)
required_modulesZ	violationN)
__doc__Z
fsm.message.netlinkr
create_attr_list_typeZ
uint32_tr
NulStringTypeZ
uint64_tr
create_genl_message_typer
,./fsm/message/netlink/fsm_genlmsg_factory.py
<module>
